Unexported handler-struct fields cannot be wired from package main.
-- go.mod --
module app

go 1.26
-- main.go --
package main

import "os"

func main() { os.Exit(run()) }
-- web/web.go --
package web

import "net/http"

type Greeter struct{}

//fabrik:provider
func NewGreeter() *Greeter { return &Greeter{} }

type Handlers struct {
	greeter *Greeter
}

//fabrik:http GET /
func (h *Handlers) Index(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	_ = h.greeter
}
-- want/diags --
error: web/web.go:11:2: field greeter of web.Handlers is unexported but its type has a provider
  help: fabrik wires from package main; export the field
